accountName.description: Name of the VTEX Account dispatching the package.

isOperating.description: Whether the store is operating or not.

district.description: District where the VTEX store dispatching the package is located.

country.description: Country where the VTEX store, dispatching the package, is located.

complement.description: Complement for the VTEX store's address.

companyName.description: Name of the VTEX store responsible for the package.

cnpj.description: CNPJ code of the VTEX store responsible for the package.

city.description: City where the VTEX store responsible for the package is located.

address.description: Address where the VTEX store responsible for the package is located.

number.description: Number of the address related to the `address` field.

postalCode.description: ZIP code of the VTEX store responsible for the package.

state.description: State of the address belonging to the VTEX store responsible for the package.

telephone.description: Telephone number of the VTEX store responsible for the package.

tradingName.description: Trading name of the VTEX store responsible for the package.
